inline_comments.message:
This isn't really a check so I don't think the method name is appropriate.  I would suggest something that better reflects the action being performed (ex: get_network_flavor)

I would also not suggest accepting cls as a parameter as only one class can be passed.  You can just pass the parameter.  Since this method will only work with ContrailV2NetworkFlavorBaseProcessor, then I'd suggest changing it to a classmethod

@classmethod
def get_network_format(cls, param):
   # rest stays the same

Then when you call the method you will change it to 

self.get_network_format(param)
